vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: Remediation only requires editing /etc/chrony.conf to remove any "peer" or "pool" directives, leaving only "server" lines. This is a standard, low‑risk configuration change that does not affect authentication, bootloader, or critical system services.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential temporary loss of NTP synchronization if all time sources are removed; Misconfiguration could cause chronyd to fail to start
